name: Crown Jewelz
short_description: Darkness has fallen, and the Queen’s jewels have been stolen by the Swine kingdom. As your lands bravest warrior, only you can embark on this perilous quest to reclaim what was lost !
detailed_description:
👑 Embark on Your Epic Saga

Prepare yourself for a grand journey across 45 captivating levels filled with adventure, danger, and the thrill of heroism. Your quest to save the kingdom is packed with excitement and challenges.

🧩 Strategic Puzzles

Put your problem-solving skills to the test with intricate puzzles that will challenge your wits and keep you engaged as you progress through the quest.

💥 Intense Beat 'Em Up Stages

Inbetween puzzle based stages you have the opportunity to unleash your combat prowess in action-packed stages. Face off against fierce enemies in thrilling beat 'em up encounters that will keep your adrenaline pumping.

🎮 Delightful Mini Games

Take a break from the main quest with fun and refreshing mini-games. These entertaining diversions offer a perfect balance to your epic adventure.

🦹 Epic Boss Battles

Confront and defeat formidable bosses in heart-pounding showdowns. Each victory brings you closer to recovering the Queen’s precious jewels and saving the kingdom.
